/usr/bin/cc -g CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_main.c.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_error.c.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_vector.c.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_matrix.c.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_linear_regression.c.o -o test_runner  ../libyaj_ml.a ../models/linear_regression/libyaj_ml_linear_regression.a ../libyaj_ml.a -lm
